𝗦𝗦𝗛𝗫 | Collaborative live terminal sharing for remote work, debugging, and pair programming.  🔥 Super Hot!

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Collaborative live terminal sharing for remote work, debugging, and pair programming.
📅 Created: Feb 2022 • Updated: Mar 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Run a single command to share your terminal
✅ Resize, move windows, and freely zoom and pan on an infinite canvas
✅ See other people's cursors moving in real time
✅ Connect to the nearest server in a globally distributed mesh
✅ End-to-end encryption with Argon2 and AES
✅ Automatic reconnection and real-time latency estimates
✅ Predictive echo for faster local editing


✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 7.4K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 276 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 19 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

sshx is a Rust-based tool for secure, collaborative live terminal sharing over the web. It allows multiple users to interact with a shared terminal session in real-time, featuring end-to-end encryption and a globally distributed server network for low latency.

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/ekzhang/sshx

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

🔥 𝗙𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗼𝘄 𝘂𝘀 for daily GitHub projects!
👉 GitHub Open Source: https://t.me/GitHub_Open_Source

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱


🏷️ 𝗧𝗔𝗚𝗦
#collaborative #rust #share #ssh #terminal

𝗠𝗘𝗦𝗛𝗚𝗘𝗡 | Enabling users to control and manipulate 3D models and scenes within Blender using natural language commands processed by AI agents.  🔥 Super Hot!

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling users to control and manipulate 3D models and scenes within Blender using natural language commands processed by AI agents.
📅 Created: Oct 2024 • Updated: Mar 2026

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ AI agent control of Blender via natural language
✅ Multiple backend options: local (llama.cpp, Ollama), remote (Hugging Face, Anthropic, OpenAI)
✅ Optional LLaMA-Mesh integration for local mesh understanding
✅ Optional Hyper3D integration for high-fidelity mesh generation


✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 818 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 62 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 16 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

MeshGen is a Blender add-on that allows users to control Blender functionalities using natural language commands interpreted by AI agents. It supports various local and remote AI model backends for inference, enhancing creative workflows by integrating AI directly into the 3D modeling process.

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/huggingface/meshgen

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗨𝗗𝗘𝗖𝗢𝗗𝗘-𝗧𝗘𝗟𝗘𝗚𝗥𝗔𝗠 | To enable users to interact with and receive responses from Claude Code through a familiar Telegram interface.  🌟 Rising Fast!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To enable users to interact with and receive responses from Claude Code through a familiar Telegram interface.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Telegram bot integration for Claude Code
✅ Message injection into Claude Code via tmux
✅ Response retrieval from Claude Code's transcript
✅ Setup via Cloudflare Tunnel for external access
✅ Bot commands for status, clearing, resuming, and looping


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 526 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 70 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

claudecode-telegram is a Python-based bridge that connects Telegram to Claude Code, allowing users to interact with Claude Code by sending messages through a Telegram bot. It leverages tmux and Cloudflare Tunnel to facilitate this communication, enabling responses to be sent back to Telegram.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/hanxiao/claudecode-telegram

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗖𝗘𝗦𝗦𝗛𝗔𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗥 | Monitoring system resources, debugging software, and detecting malware on Windows.  📈 Growing!

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 C 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Monitoring system resources, debugging software, and detecting malware on Windows.
📅 Created: Feb 2013 • Updated: Mar 2026

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Detailed system activity overview with highlighting
✅ Graphs and statistics for resource hog tracking
✅ File usage detection
✅ Network connection monitoring
✅ Real-time disk access information
✅ Detailed stack traces with kernel-mode, WOW64 and .NET support
✅ Service creation, editing, and control
✅ Portable and no installation required


⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 996 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 193 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 8 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

System Informer is a free, open-source tool for Windows that provides detailed system monitoring, software debugging, and malware detection capabilities. It offers real-time insights into system activity, resource usage, network connections, and file access, allowing users to manage processes and services effectively.

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/PKRoma/ProcessHacker
